identity.name: Carib Hut
identity.vibe: Scandi-Tropico: Clean European structure meets Caribbean soul.
identity.description: A fusion of Swedish minimalism and vibrant Caribbean energy. The design uses generous negative space, crisp typography, and structured grids (European) as a canvas for explosive, saturated colors and lush imagery (Tropical).

rules.headings: Use 'Syne' for all H1-H3. H1 should be massive (text-6xl+). Use font-extrabold for impact.
rules.body: Use 'DM Sans' for all paragraphs. Keep line-height loose (leading-relaxed).
rules.menu_items: Use 'Space Grotesk' for menu item names to give a modern bistro feel.

usage.primary_bg: Use '#FDFCF8' (Warm Sand) as the main background, NOT pure white.
usage.accents: Use the vibrant brand colors (Pink, Green, Orange) for tags, buttons, and decorative blobs/shapes. Do not use them for large text backgrounds unless it's a specific 'loud' section.
usage.text: Use '#1A1A18' (Soft Black) for text. Never use pure black.
usage.gradients: Avoid gradients on buttons. Use solid vibrant colors. You MAY use subtle, blurred gradient orbs in the background.

spacing.scale: 2x standard Tailwind. Use p-8, p-12, p-16.

layout.hero_section: Asymmetric 'Tetris' layout. Text on left (overlapping image), Image on right (but not a perfect square).
layout.menu_layout: Clean European Bistro list. Name on left, dotted leader or ample space, Price on right. Description below. Tags (Spicy, Vegan) as small pill badges.
layout.navbar: Sticky, glassmorphism (backdrop-blur-md). Logo left, Links center, CTA right.

visual_enhancers.radius: rounded-none or rounded-sm (Sharp/Clean Scandi feel) or rounded-3xl (Playful). DECISION: rounded-2xl for friendly but organized feel.
visual_enhancers.shadows: shadow-[4px_4px_0px_0px_rgba(0,0,0,1)] (Neo-brutalist pop) OR shadow-lg (Soft). DECISION: Soft, diffuse shadows 'shadow-xl' for depth, no hard borders.
visual_enhancers.texture: Add a subtle 'noise' overlay to the entire body to kill digital flatness.

animations.hover: Scale up (scale-105) on cards. Buttons fill with color on hover.

buttons.primary: bg-[#008080] text-white hover:bg-[#006666] rounded-full px-8 py-4 font-bold tracking-wide transition-all shadow-lg hover:shadow-xl
buttons.secondary: border-2 border-[#1A1A18] text-[#1A1A18] hover:bg-[#1A1A18] hover:text-white rounded-full px-8 py-4 font-bold transition-all

cards.style: bg-white p-8 rounded-2xl shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-all border border-stone-100
cards.content: Image top (aspect-video or square), Title bold, Text muted.

media.image_style: High saturation, warm temperature. Food should look juicy. People should look happy.
media.icons: Lucide React. Use stroke-width=1.5 for a clean look.

instructions_to_main_agent: SETUP: Add the Google Fonts import to index.css or a layout file.
THEME: Implement the 'Scandi-Tropico' vibe. Do not make it look like a generic bootstrap site.
NAVIGATION: Create a custom 'Navbar' component that handles scrolling to sections (Hero, Menu, Drinks, About, Contact).
MENU: Build a 'MenuSection' that maps through a JSON object of items. Don't hardcode individual HTML for every dish.
CONTACT: Add a map placeholder and a stylish footer.
RESPONSIVE: Ensure the 'Tetris' grid collapses to a single column on mobile.
TESTING: Add data-testid to all interactive elements.
universal_guidelines: Create depth through layered design elements.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable.
